message:
test(pt-core): expand no-mock coverage for BOCPD and MPP inference

bocpd.rs: 10→43 tests (EmissionModel serde, config validation, error display, detector updates,
evidence, log_sum_exp/ln_gamma edge cases, change point detection)
mpp.rs: 12→36 tests (config defaults, BurstinessLevel classification/display/log_odds, MarkedEvent,
summary invalid, evidence severity, add_arrays, inter-arrival CV, batch analyzer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
